title: RRR - A Relatable, Reliable and Realistic Review
description:
#RRR #EntertainmentNews2022 #CultureCasino

RRR - Rise Roar Revolt

Well if the title didn't clue you in, here are my thoughts on RRR. While not a formal review I am providing a rating in this video and in the interest of providing NO SPOILERS I give few details.

Generally speaking, this film is worth your time. Set aside the 3 hours 2 minutes for this fun action adventure/ musical dance/ fantastical period piece of Friendship, Honor, & Rebellion. You will LOVE Bheem & Raju!

Also, No worries, no animals are hurt in this film.
